title: Senior Data Analyst
description:
We are seeking an enthusiastic Data Analyst to join our growing team. In this role, you will apply core skills in SQL, Python, Excel, Tableau to solve challenging projects, collaborate with cross-functional partners, and deploy production-ready solutions.

Key Responsibilities:
- Architect data-driven/software tools centered on Data Analyst objectives.
- Leverage tools like SQL, Python, Excel, Tableau, Git to support key objectives.
- Write clean code, generate comprehensive documentations, and present key indicators to stakeholders.

Requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in CS, Data Science, Math, or equivalent field experience.
- Solid expertise in: SQL, Python, Excel, Tableau, Power BI.
- Strong analytical background and clear verbal/written communicator.
